category_sources: Official repository description says testssl.sh tests TLS/SSL encryption anywhere on any port.
source_facts.description says it checks TLS/SSL ciphers and flaws.
display_name_sources: source_facts.executables include testssl.sh and source_facts.homepage is https://testssl.sh/.
docs_sources: Official GitHub wiki contains Usage Documentation and related documentation pages.
source_facts.homepage is the official project homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/testssl/testssl.sh; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official repository topics and README cover TLS, SSL, ciphers, vulnerabilities, and command-line use.
source_facts.description identifies TLS/SSL cipher and flaw checking.
